news.paragraph: Stifel has reaffirmed a bullish outlook on Starbucks, which may provide support for the stock. Conversely, rising coffee prices could impact margins for large coffee chains, creating potential cost headwinds. No specific upcoming earnings or regulatory catalysts are highlighted in the recent news.
